subject: Heavily armored large humanoid warrior in dark armor with glowing energy effects
description: A large, heavily built humanoid figure in dark plated armor stands in a powerful stance. The armor is bulky and angular, covering most of the body. Glowing yellow-white energy surrounds and emanates from the figure, creating a halo-like aura. The face is partially visible — stern and imposing. The background is a yellow-gold energy radiance that frames the figure as dominant and commanding. The overall read is of a high-ranking military commander radiating dangerous power.
foreground: Large armored humanoid in dark plating, glowing yellow energy aura
